zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期上涨趋势明显，回调压力存在
zh.content:
当前比特币价格位于70719.07美元附近，较24小时内低点68523.56有所回升，显示短期多头力量较强。价格突破20日均线SMA(20)=68398.86，表明上行动能尚存，但接近近期高点71491.46，短线存在一定获利回吐压力。  

MACD值为27.63621，显示多头动能依旧，但缺乏信号线参考，短期可能出现震荡整理。价格上行过程中需关注71491.46阻力位，若无法有效突破，可能引发小幅回落。同时，68523.56低点以及SMA(20)可视为主要支撑区域，多头回调有望获得支撑。  

交易策略上，短线可考虑逢低吸纳，多单持有，但建议严格设定止损在68500附近，以防意外回调。若价格稳健突破71500，短期上行空间或进一步延伸至72000-72500区域，但应警惕超买迹象。  

总体来看，比特币在当前价位呈现震荡偏多格局，短期上涨趋势明显，但高位阻力压力不容忽视。投资者可关注支撑位布局多单，合理控制仓位，避免追高操作，同时密切留意行情突破与回撤信号。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently showing a strong upward momentum, trading at $70,719, up 3.19% in the last 24 hours. The recent rally pushed prices toward the daily high of $71,491, signaling bullish sentiment. The SMA(20) at $68,398 provides a solid dynamic support, reflecting that the short-term trend remains upward. Traders observing this price behavior should note the continuation of higher highs and higher lows, indicating a sustained bullish trend in the near term.  

Momentum indicators suggest room for cautious optimism. The MACD value of 27.63621, despite the missing signal line, implies a bullish crossover scenario likely occurred recently. This momentum is reinforced by price trading above the SMA(20), suggesting the trend favors buyers. Even though the RSI is unavailable, the rapid price increase hints at potential overextension, so short-term pullbacks may occur before further upward acceleration.  

Key levels to watch include immediate resistance at $71,500, where sellers could test the strength of the rally. On the downside, support around $68,400 aligns with the 20-period SMA, with stronger support near $68,000 if volatility increases. Breaking above resistance could open targets near $72,500–$73,000, while a breakdown below SMA support might signal a retracement toward $67,500, offering critical reference points for risk management.  

For trading, short-term buyers may consider entering on minor pullbacks near support, using tight stop-losses to mitigate risk. Longer-term positions remain justified while prices sustain above $68,400, with profit-taking near resistance levels. Conservative traders could wait for a breakout above $71,500 to confirm continuation, whereas aggressive traders may use intraday dips for scaling in, capitalizing on the current bullish momentum.
